details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully met: (1) Stats variant with StatsArgs struct including human bool flag added to CacheCommand enum, (2) Implementation correctly iterates over CacheBucket::iter() and computes sizes using DiskUsage, (3) Function signature is pub(crate) fn cache_stats with Result<ExitStatus> return, (4) --human flag implemented with human_readable_bytes for formatted output, (5) Per-bucket lines and total line are output correctly, (6) Module properly registered in mod.rs with pub(crate) use and mod declaration, (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs matches CacheCommand::Stats and calls cache_stats, (8) Code follows cache size command patterns (same function signature, preview warning, output structure). Additional strengths: adds CacheBucket::display_name() method for readability, properly registers CacheStats preview feature, includes comprehensive test coverage (empty cache, raw bytes, human-readable), and adds test helper methods.
